title: Version 3.4 — Dashboard UX
summary: **Patch intent bands (universal ladder):** `.0` Charter · `.1` Connectra · `.2` Gateway · `.3` Dashboard · `.4` Jobs/S3 · `.5` Satellite · `.6` Observability · `.7` Hardening · `.8` Evidence · `.9` Gate / handoff.
flowcharts:
flowchart TD
    stage["3.4.x Dashboard UX"]
    contract["Contract"]
    service["Service"]
    surface["Surface"]
    data["Data"]
    ops["Ops"]
    gate["Release gate"]
    stage --> contract --> gate
    stage --> service --> gate
    stage --> surface --> gate
    stage --> data --> gate
    stage --> ops --> gate

flowchart LR
    side["advanced filter sidebar"] --> state["filter state in app"]
    state --> save["SaveSearchModal plus SavedSearchesModal"]
    save --> gql["savedSearchesService GraphQL"]
    gql --> results["contacts companies table"]
    results --> drill["company detail route by id"]
    drill --> export["useNewExport hook from current VQL"]
    export --> jobs["jobs page status plus download"]
    jobs --> gate["3.4 release gate"]
